name: Notify and escalate on incident
description: React to an incident event: a triage agent assesses it, the on-duty role is asked to acknowledge with hourly reminders, and an unacknowledged incident escalates to a second role after 4 hours. The final status is announced.

steps.prompt: An incident event arrived. Assess its impact and urgency from the event payload: {{ctx.summary}}. Produce a short triage note with a recommended first action.

human.message: Incident reported: {{ctx.summary}}. Triage note: {{steps.triage.text}}. Please acknowledge that you are handling it.
Escalation: the incident ({{ctx.summary}}) was not acknowledged by the on-duty role within 4 hours. Please take over. Triage note: {{steps.triage.text}}

steps.prompt: Announce the incident handling status: who acknowledged or took over the incident ({{ctx.summary}}) and what happens next.

agents.label: Triage agent
agents.description: Agent that assesses the incoming incident and writes the triage note.

agents.label: Notifying agent
agents.description: Agent that announces the final incident handling status.

roles.label: On-duty role
roles.description: Role asked to acknowledge the incident first.

roles.label: Escalation role
roles.description: Role that takes over when the on-duty role misses the 4-hour deadline.

events.label: Incident event
events.description: Catalog event that starts a run of this workflow.

channels.label: Delivery channel
channels.description: Channel used to reach the on-duty and escalation roles.
